meta.name: Western Physiognomy & Facial Psychology
meta.source: Johann Kaspar Lavater, Cesare Lombroso (historical), Paul Ekman (modern micro-expressions), Eric Standop (face reading), Alexander Todorov (modern research)
meta.description: Western face reading combining classical physiognomy with modern facial psychology and micro-expression science

four_temperaments.name: Four Temperaments (Tứ Khí Chất Tây Phương)

sanguine.name: Sanguine (Lạc Quan)
sanguine.interview_behavior: Talkative, tells stories, animated gestures, may go off-topic, friendly

choleric.name: Choleric (Nóng Nảy)
choleric.interview_behavior: Direct, confident, may challenge questions, time-conscious, results-focused

melancholic.name: Melancholic (Trầm Tư)
melancholic.interview_behavior: Prepared, brings documents, asks detailed questions, reserved, thoughtful answers

phlegmatic.name: Phlegmatic (Điềm Tĩnh)
phlegmatic.interview_behavior: Calm, polite, consistent answers, doesn't rush, may seem understated

face_shapes.name: Face Shape Analysis
face_shapes.source: Jang & Lee (2019), Eric Standop, Jean Haner

oval.description: Elliptical, forehead wider than jaw, cheekbones widest

round.description: Width and length similar, full cheeks, soft jaw

square.description: Strong jaw, forehead and jaw similar width, angular

heart.description: Wide forehead, narrow chin, high cheekbones

long_oblong.description: Longer than wide, high forehead, long chin

diamond.description: Narrow forehead and jaw, wide cheekbones

micro_expressions.name: Micro-Expression Analysis (Paul Ekman)
micro_expressions.source: Paul Ekman FACS (Facial Action Coding System)
micro_expressions.description: 7 universal emotions visible in 1/25 second micro-expressions

happiness.indicators: Crow's feet, raised cheeks, Duchenne smile (orbicularis oculi)
happiness.hiring_signal: Genuine smile = comfortable, honest. Fake smile (mouth only) = nervous or hiding

sadness.indicators: Inner brow raise, lip corners down, lower lip pushes up
sadness.hiring_signal: If frequent → may have personal issues affecting work

anger.indicators: Brows down and together, lips pressed, jaw tight, nostrils flare
anger.hiring_signal: Micro-anger during discussion → disagreement being suppressed

fear.indicators: Eyebrows raised and together, eyes wide, mouth slightly open
fear.hiring_signal: Fear flashes → topic they're uncomfortable with (may indicate deception)

surprise.indicators: Eyebrows raised (curved), eyes wide, jaw drops
surprise.hiring_signal: Genuine surprise = not prepared for that question

disgust.indicators: Nose wrinkle, upper lip raised, lower lip pushed forward
disgust.hiring_signal: Disgust → strongly disagree or find topic unpleasant

contempt.indicators: One-sided mouth raise (smirk), one eyebrow slightly raised
contempt.hiring_signal: ⚠️ Contempt = feeling superior. Red flag in team-oriented roles

interview_tips: Watch for incongruence: says 'I loved my team' but shows contempt/disgust
Genuine emotions are symmetrical; fake ones are asymmetric
Micro-expressions last <0.5 second — need practice to spot
Baseline first: observe natural expressions before asking tough questions
Context matters: fear of questions ≠ lying (could be anxiety)

avoidant.description: Avoids eye contact, looks down or away
avoidant.note: Cultural factor: some Asian cultures avoid direct eye contact as respect

intense_staring.signal: Dominant, possibly intimidating, may be compensating

darting.signal: Anxious, processing quickly, or checking for reactions
darting.note: Normal during thinking; concerning if constant

upward_right.description: Looks up and to their right
upward_right.note: ⚠️ Eye-direction lie detection is NOT reliable. Do not use as sole indicator.

ai_prompt_templates.description: Templates for AI vision models to analyze faces
ai_prompt_templates.combined_analysis: Analyze this face photo. Describe: 1) Face shape (oval/round/square/heart/long/diamond), 2) Temperament (sanguine/choleric/melancholic/phlegmatic), 3) Expression reading (emotion, confidence level, energy), 4) Eye contact quality, 5) Overall first impression (1-10). Format as JSON.
ai_prompt_templates.hiring_quick: As a hiring consultant, give your first impression of this candidate photo: 1) Energy level (high/moderate/low), 2) Confidence signal (strong/moderate/weak), 3) Approachability (1-10), 4) Professional appearance (1-10), 5) Best-fit role type. Be concise.
ai_prompt_templates.emotion_check: Describe the emotional state visible in this face: primary emotion, secondary emotion, congruence (does the expression match what they're saying?), stress indicators, comfort level.

hiring_application_guide.disclaimer: ⚠️ Western physiognomy has limited scientific validation. Use as SUPPLEMENTARY data only, never as primary hiring criteria.
evidence_based: Micro-expressions (Ekman) — scientifically validated for emotion detection
First impressions — research shows they form in 100ms but are often biased
Face shape → personality has weak scientific support (treat as hypothesis only)
ethical_guidelines: NEVER reject based on appearance alone
Be aware of attractiveness bias (halo effect)
Cultural differences affect facial expression interpretation
Physiognomy is historically associated with racism — use responsibly
Always combine with objective assessments (tests, interviews, references)
hiring_application_guide.weighting: Western physiognomy should be max 5-10% of total assessment weight
